@codex review this PR using AGENTS.md.

Focus only on:
1. P0 safety/state/routing/build blockers
2. P1 mobile UX/i18n/accessibility regressions
3. missing tests or QA evidence for changed behavior

Return:
- Verdict
- P0 blockers
- P1 improvements
- exact files
- acceptance criteria

Do not suggest broad rewrites.
